1.description: Before- and after-tax returns. The figure depicts the before- and after-tax returns of the two investment options at different aggregate portfolio allocation levels. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

2.description: Equilibrium portfolio allocations and returns. The figure depicts the equilibrium portfolio allocations and the equilibrium before- and after-tax returns at different distributions of tax clienteles. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

3.description: Average fund distributions. The figure depicts the average distributions of dividends (DIV), short-term capital gains (SCG), and long-term capital gains (LCG) by U.S. equity mutual funds. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

4.description: Marginal tax rates. The figure depicts the top marginal tax rates on qualified dividends (DIV), short-term capital gains (SCG), and long-term capital gains (LCG) over our sample period. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

5.description: Tax burdens. The figure depicts the first quartile, median, and third quartile of the tax burdens over our sample period. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
